creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text: I don't see the word "hyperlink" anywhere in buildbot-www's distfiles, nor can I find that reference anywhere in /usr/local/lib/python2.7.  Do you have any modifications in your ports tree for either buildbot-www or buildbot-pkg ?  If not, then you probably have some other port build with non-default options.  You could try "grep -R hyperlink /usr/local/lib/python2.7" from within the jail to find the culprit.
